ques: In the Asia section, browse and identify the most recent report about technological advancements and summarize its content.
answer: The most recent Asia-section tech report (1 day ago) is "Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities." Anthropic told US Congress that Alibaba-linked operators used thousands of fake accounts to run ~29 million exchanges with its Claude AI model in the largest "distillation attack" of its kind — extracting Claude's most valuable capabilities to train a rival model. It warned this industrial-scale theft of US AI threatens national security and the military, and urged Congress to penalize such firms. The piece adds that Alibaba is suing to be removed from a Pentagon blacklist, OpenAI has made similar past accusations, and both Anthropic and OpenAI are nearing major IPOs.
